content.1: CHARACTER — the holder. Buys or receives a ticket, registers in the collective citing the ticket grain, and REDEEMS: plays the world, writes the gated blocks, wakes the shell, walks the door the ticket names. The holder's experience is the whole point of the ecology; every other stance serves it. Mechanically: a checkout click, then two substrate writes (register + cite), then the experience itself.
content.2: AUTHOR — the seller. Creates a ticket FOR A PURPOSE: founds or keeps the collective, writes its payway config at position 9, defines the product (face, scope, duration, price), and OWNS THE PROMISE the ticket carries — including its fulfilment when the product provisions something (a hatch, a minted character, a commissioned region). The fulfiller-crab, when it exists, is the Author's servant, holding the Author's authority, living wherever the Author runs it.
content.3: DESIGNER — the machine-keeper. Stands up and shapes the TICKET MACHINE itself: forks the reference issuer, brings their own payment rail (their Stripe, their gift keys, their bank instructions), deploys it, tunes its drivers and caps. One machine serves many Authors' products; a collective points at a machine by one address (position 9.1) and migrates in five minutes. Anyone may be a Designer; no beach host's permission is involved.
content.4: OBSERVER — the verifier. Watches without participating: walks ticket grains against the eight rules and writes verdicts into a PUBLIC audit log on its own beach. Defaults to the issuer (9.5 → 9.1) but is separable by design — anyone may verify, and clients choose whose verdicts to trust. The audit log is the ecology's outward face: trust without asking anyone to be trusted.
content.5: The two product patterns. MEMBERSHIP: the verified registration IS the thing — a world door, a season pass, an author's seat; no fulfilment exists; most products are this. PROVISIONING: the verified registration entitles the holder to something MADE — a hatched mind, a minted character, a commissioned scenario; fulfilment is the Author's promise kept, by hand until volume warrants a crab. The genus-hatch was provisioning; the RPG world door will be membership.
content.6: What is what. MECHANICAL (pure code, no mind): payment rails, grain issuance, the eight verification rules, audit writes, expiry and revocation sweeps, rider arithmetic (sha256 chain, credit conservation, SQ recompute). AGENT (an LLM in a seat): fulfilment that authors content, the selling conversation, judgment in disputes — and the human judgment of WHAT is worth sharing WITH WHOM, which no code replaces. SEMANTIC (pscale blocks): everything that means — the collectives, the configs, the scope strings, the conventions including this one. Code carries arithmetic; agents carry judgment; blocks carry meaning.
content.7: The boundary and the circulation — the Sqale horizon. The ticket machine is the FIAT BOUNDARY: the one place traditional money enters, a market-shaped act (buyer, seller, price) because that is the shape money arrives in — Volume 3's own line: users BUY THE EXPERIENCE OF PARTICIPATING IN A GIFT ECONOMY. Inside, the economy is not exchange but CIRCULATION: vector-money moves FORWARD with what is shared — the SAND rider is the packet (a thing AND credits, signed, chained), pscale_verify_rider is its conservation arithmetic, and the recipient RECEIVES BOTH the experience and the money. Not a market of buyers and sellers; a community of givers and receivers. Buying a ticket for another (the gift of egg-three) is a warm social act at the boundary; ORGANIC SHARING — the thing given WITH credits, shared forward, added to — is the economy itself. The number never separates from what is shared and who shares it.
content.9: Provenance and variation. Written by weft 2026-07-09 from the first operator-run evidence (sed:genus-hatch, grains c92625404e5214f3 and 9d50ed7b57eb51ee, audit sed:hatch-tickets-audit-2026-07); root underscore under weft's operational lock, digit positions open — edit as Designer, fork per collective, and let the wild supersede. Protocol: pscale://payway. Circulation primitives: pscale://sand-rider, pscale_verify_rider. Reference machine: pscale-commons/ticketing-agent (live at genus-tickets-production.up.railway.app).
content._: ways:tickets — how anyone stands toward the ticket ecology at a federated beach. Four stances, two patterns, one boundary and one circulation. The convention here is the best current guess, GRIT-style: superseded by practice in the wild, per-collective, never legislated. Protocol truth lives at pscale://payway; this block carries the STANCES a person or agent takes toward it. Founded 2026-07-09 after the first operator run (genus-hatch: three eggs, one live-money sale, a public counter).
